title: About This Module: A Modern, Thriving Society
overview:
Welcome to Module 4: A Modern, Thriving Society.

This module covers contemporary British life — arts, culture, customs, religion, sport and everyday society. While some sections feel like general knowledge, the test expects you to know specific facts about named people, places, events and dates.

Pay close attention to the names of composers, artists, authors, athletes, and the specific dates and statistics given.

study_sections.heading: What You Will Learn
study_sections.content:
In this module, you will learn about:
• Arts and culture: music, theatre, art, architecture and literature
• Customs and traditions: festivals, bank holidays and celebrations
• Leisure: cinema, television, food and pub culture
• Places of interest: national parks and famous landmarks
• Religion: churches, patron saints and religious diversity
• Sport: popular sports and notable British sportspeople
• The UK today: capitals, currency, population and equality

study_sections.heading: Study Tips
study_sections.content:
This module has a large number of named individuals — composers, painters, actors, authors and athletes. Use these strategies:

• Group people by their field (e.g. classical composers together, authors together)
• Learn dates of birth and death where given, as these sometimes appear in test questions
• For patron saints, learn both the saint's name AND the date of their day
• For sport, learn which athletes achieved which 'firsts' (first to run mile under 4 minutes, first Briton to win Tour de France, etc.)
• For TV licence rules, learn the specific figures (£1,000 fine, over-75 free, blind 50% discount)

key_facts: This module covers arts, customs, leisure, places, religion, sport and everyday UK life.
Test questions focus on specific names, dates, places and statistics.
Patron saint days are testable: 1 March (Wales), 17 March (NI), 23 April (England), 30 November (Scotland).
memory_hook: Modern society = people and places. For each lesson, focus on the 'firsts', 'onlys' and specific numbers — these are the most testable facts.

supportive_messages.high_score: Great start! Move on to the arts and culture lesson now! 🎨
supportive_messages.medium_score: Good! Focus on the specific names and dates in each lesson! 📚
supportive_messages.low_score: Take it one topic at a time - there's a lot here but you'll get there! 💪
